feature_name: P0 billing and finance module page specification
goal: define the frozen P0 requirements for the billing and finance module so the firm can track receivables, payments, arrears risk, and collection follow-up at case level without expanding into broader finance operations
must_have: billing list page with the specified case, customer, group, receivable, received, outstanding, next-node, and payment-status fields
default filters for payment status, group, and owner
case-level billing-plan section with stage-bound fee nodes, amount due, due date, and status
payment-record section with amount, date, voucher, and linked BillingPlan
collection-task creation for overdue unpaid cases
arrears-risk confirmation flow for continuing submission under unpaid status
role-based visibility and editing for administrator, finance, lead owner, and assistant
out_of_scope: customer-facing arrears reminders through portal or external channels
step-level billing hard blocking such as gate_trigger_step COE_SENT
business_rules: P0 does not treat arrears as a universal hard block for submission
billing nodes are bound to case stages and trigger internal reminders when reached
billing exceptions are exposed as risk signals rather than universal blocking
continuing submission under arrears requires risk confirmation with confirmer and reason and may include an optional voucher
payment recording updates outstanding amount and must remain traceable
collection support stays internal in P0 and does not include external customer reminder delivery
visibility and editability follow role, group, and responsible or collaborator access rules
finance-related export capability remains controlled and auditable rather than broadly open
edge_cases: empty state when no billing plan exists for a case
case fully paid and marked as settled
overdue unpaid node highlighted and triggering collection follow-up
submission attempted under arrears requiring explicit risk-confirmation trace before continuation
partial payment leaving a remaining outstanding balance
acceptance_criteria: the list page renders the required billing fields and filters
the module exposes billing-plan and payment-record sections with the specified fields
authorized users can register payments and upload vouchers linked to PaymentRecord
authorized users can create collection tasks for overdue billing nodes
arrears-risk confirmation records confirmer and reason before unpaid submission continues
overdue and settled states are visibly represented in the module
assistant access is read-only for visible collaborative finance data
P0 behavior remains limited to manual payment logging and internal risk handling without invoices, reports, auto-reconciliation, customer-facing reminders, or step-level hard billing blocks
